_comment: Each tag defines a parameter bias vector. Tags are blended additively then normalized. Parameters are 0.0–1.0 unless noted. See shader_visualizer.html for uniform definitions.

_params.bassWeight: How much low-frequency (20–250Hz) energy drives movement
_params.midWeight: How much mid-frequency (250Hz–4kHz) energy drives movement
_params.highWeight: How much high-frequency (4kHz+) energy drives detail/sparkle
_params.decay: How fast visuals fade after a transient (0=instant, 1=long tail)
_params.timeScale: Speed of autonomous movement independent of audio
_params.symmetry: Radial symmetry fold count bias (maps to 2–8 folds)
_params.particleDensity: Density of point/particle elements vs fluid fields
